content:
Imagine you and your friends want to keep track of who has traded toys, but there’s no teacher or parent to write it down. Instead, everyone has a special notebook, and every time someone trades a toy, everyone writes it down in their own notebook at the same time. This way, all the notebooks have the same list of trades.

This is how a blockchain works! It’s like a group of notebooks all connected to each other. When someone buys or sells something, like digital money called cryptocurrency, the trade is written in many notebooks around the world. Because everyone has the same list, it’s very hard for anyone to cheat or change the records. There’s no need for a bank or a boss to keep track because all the people in the group help keep the records correct and safe. So, blockchain is a smart way to share and protect information without one single person in charge!
